message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam backgroundColor black
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #6EC1E4
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  LifeLineBorderThickness 2
  ParticipantBorderColor #6EC1E4
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #BFE8FF
  ActorBorderColor #6EC1E4
  ActorBackgroundColor #BFE8FF
  EntityBorderColor #6EC1E4
  EntityBackgroundColor #FFF7C7
  ControlBorderColor #6EC1E4
  ControlBackgroundColor #D9D9D9
  BoundaryBorderColor #6EC1E4
  BoundaryBackgroundColor #BFE8FF
  ArrowColor #6EC1E4
  ArrowThickness 2
  MessageAlign center
}

actor " " as A

boundary "«boundary»\nZMRegistracijskiObrazec" as ZMReg
boundary "«boundary»\nZMDomačaStran" as ZMDom
control "«control»\nKrmilnikRegistracija" as KR
entity "«entity»\nUporabnik" as U

activate ZMReg
activate KR
activate U
activate U
deactivate U
deactivate U
deactivate KR
deactivate ZMReg
@enduml
